title: SignHere
description: A signature tab placed on a document.

tabLabel.description: Label used to identify the tab.

documentId.description: The document ID where this tab is placed.

pageNumber.description: The page number where this tab is placed.

recipientId.description: The recipient this tab is assigned to.

xPosition.description: The X position of the tab on the page.

yPosition.description: The Y position of the tab on the page.

anchorString.description: Anchor text string used to automatically position the tab.

anchorXOffset.description: X offset from the anchor string position.

anchorYOffset.description: Y offset from the anchor string position.

anchorUnits.description: Units for anchor offsets (pixels, inches, mms, cms).

optional.description: When true, the tab is optional for the recipient.

stampType.description: The type of stamp for the signature.
